summary: Comprehensive testing of Rudralife Recommendation Website - all core features working. 15/15 backend tests passed, all frontend flows tested end-to-end successfully.

issues: Text overlay on result page hero shows slight text-behind-image rendering but content is readable

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS allows_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — technically browsers reject credentialed CORS with wildcard origin. Since auth uses Bearer token in headers (not cookies), this works fine. No fix needed but worth noting.
server.py: seed_admin() uses os.environ.get() with hardcoded fallback values for ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD — acceptable for dev but should use env vars in production.
server.py: JWT_SECRET has a fallback dev value — should raise error if env var is missing in production.
RecommendationForm.js: The date input renders browser's native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy shown in screenshot) instead of a custom component. Acceptable but noted.
seed_data_creation: Test form submissions created: test@example.com (Test User), test_rudra@example.com (TEST_User Rudra)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 form steps work, form submits to /api/form/submit, result page shows recommendation with WhatsApp CTA. Admin login/dashboard/logout all functional. Landing page has hero with Indramala bg, animated stats counters, FAQ accordion, and auto-scrolling carousels. No issues found.
